name: gestao_filmes
description: Monorepo — Teste técnico Microkids (gestão de filmes OMDb)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter api start:dev" "pnpm --filter web start --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4200"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate deploy
